goal: 修复 Catty dogfood health 本地日期与 UTC 记录错位

summary.title: 修复 Catty dogfood health 本地日期错位
summary.what: 新增 Catty 本地日期窗口 helper，并让 report、memory-candidates、dogfood-health 的 --date 与默认日期都按操作者本地日解释，再用 UTC createdAt 范围查询持久记录；同步 memory-canary 帮助文案和 src/catty/README.md，避免 Asia/Shanghai 午夜后把当天 live dogfood prediction/judgement 误判为空。
summary.why: Catty 持久记录使用 UTC ISO createdAt，但日常 dogfood 操作按本地日期发起。旧实现用 createdAt.startsWith(YYYY-MM-DD) 做过滤，导致本地 2026-05-27 对应的 UTC 2026-05-26 晚间记录无法被 report、memory-candidates 和 dogfood-health 看到，误报 no_predictions/no_judgements，掩盖真正的下一步 blocker。
summary.user_goal: 修复 Catty dogfood health 本地日期与 UTC 记录错位

decisions.chose: 把 --date YYYY-MM-DD 定义为操作者本地日，并转换成 UTC ISO 起止窗口查询 createdAt。
decisions.rationale: Dogfood 命令由本机操作员按本地日期执行；数据落库仍保持 UTC ISO，窗口查询能同时保留存储一致性和人类操作语义。
rejected: 继续用 createdAt 字符串前缀匹配
把 live 数据 createdAt 改成本地时间字符串

decisions.chose: report、memory-candidates、dogfood-health 默认使用本地日期，而不是 new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)。
decisions.rationale: 默认命令应和操作者看到的今天一致，避免亚洲时区午夜后默认落到错误 UTC day。

decisions.chose: 只修复日期窗口和只读汇总语义，不改变 shadow/judge/canary/accepted-memory 协议。
decisions.rationale: 当前目标是解除 dogfood health 的假 blocker；真实 user-prior/canary 队列仍应作为后续产品切片推进。

decisions.chose: 把 preflight 中的 trail、judge、shadow CLI、busy-timeout 等 overlap 分类为同一 catty 分支上的顺序切片，不作为语义冲突。
decisions.rationale: 本 intent 只在已有持久 dogfood 链路上修正日期解释，不改变这些切片已经定义的协议和安全边界。

rejected.alternative: 直接制造 user-prior candidate 来消除 dogfood blocker
rejected.reason: 当前 live seed 是 StubBrain/StubJudge 产生的 overbroad prediction-eval，不能为了绿灯把 prediction/judgement 写成 user memory。

rejected.alternative: 把 Catty shadow/judge 接到 60s heartbeat 产出更多样本
rejected.reason: 本轮目标是修复只读 dogfood 诊断错位；高频模型或写入调度需要单独设计和批准。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/date-window.test.ts src/catty/report.test.ts src/catty/memory-candidates.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，13 pass。
验证通过：bun test，全量 74 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check。
Live smoke：bun src/catty/report.ts --date 2026-05-27 返回 total=2、judged=2，证明本地日能包含 UTC 2026-05-26 晚间记录。
Live smoke：bun src/catty/memory-candidates.ts --date 2026-05-27 --max 5 返回 2 条 prediction-eval、0 条 user-prior；这些 stub miss 被正确保留为 eval data，不写 user memory。
Live smoke：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date 2026-05-27 --max 5 不再出现 no_predictions/no_judgements；剩余 blocker 是 no_user_prior_candidates、no_canary_plans、no_canary_queue。
Runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 launchd heartbeat loaded，observe OK，full pipeline 正常 throttled。
工作区仍有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty 文件，未 stage、未提交、未修改；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该状态。

architectural_claims: Catty CLI date filters now treat operator-facing dates as local calendar days while preserving UTC ISO createdAt storage.
Daily report, memory candidate dry-run, and dogfood health share the same local-day window semantics instead of each doing ad hoc date-prefix filtering.
The fix keeps prediction eval, trial heuristic, and user-prior admission boundaries unchanged.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/report.ts --date YYYY-MM-DD now aggregates records whose UTC createdAt falls inside that local day window.
bun src/catty/memory-candidates.ts --date YYYY-MM-DD now selects judged misses by the same local day window.
bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts with no --date now defaults to the local date and no longer falsely reports empty predictions after local midnight.
memory-canary help text now describes --date as a local date.

api_changes.signature: src/catty/date-window.ts: localDateWindow(date: string, now?: Date): { startIso: string; endIso: string }; localDateString(now?: Date): string

security_implications: No secrets, config tokens, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json contents are read or printed by the new date helper.
The live smoke paths remain dry-run/read-only for report, memory-candidates, and dogfood-health; no user memory is written.
No heartbeat or model-provider invocation path was added.
migration_notes: No database migration is required; existing UTC createdAt values are queried through local-day windows.
